error.sessionFailed: Could not start your session. Please try again.
error.accountDenied: Account access denied. Please contact your parent.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

step1.subtitle: Step 1 of 2: your age and country.
step1.ageTooYoung: You must be at least 8 years old to use InvestiKid.
step1.needsConsentMessage: You're {{age}} in {{country}} — your parent's email will be required to set up your account.
step1.noConsentMessage: You're {{age}} in {{country}} — you can set up your own account.

step2.subtitle: Step 2 of 2: your sign-in details.
step2.password: Password (min 12 characters, must include letter + digit)
step2.parentEmailHelp: We'll email your parent to approve your account.
step2.policyCheckbox: I (or my grown-up) have read the
step2.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

privacyDialog.title: Privacy Notice
privacyDialog.description: How InvestiKid collects, uses, and protects your information.

parentLogin.title: Parents' sign-in
parentLogin.subtitle: Manage your child's account.
parentLogin.intro: Enter the email address you used when your child signed up.
parentLogin.socialError: We couldn't sign you in with that account. Ask your child to sign up with your email first, or use the email link below.

success.title: Check your inbox
success.message: If an InvestiKid account is linked to {{email}}, we've sent a sign-in link. The link will expire in 15 minutes.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll email you a reset link.
forgotPassword.intro: Enter your email or username and we'll send you a reset link.

success.title: Check your email
success.message: If that account exists, we've sent a reset link. Check your email (or ask a grown-up).

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.newPasswordHint: Min 12 characters, must include a letter and a digit.

invalidLink.title: That link didn't work
invalidLink.subtitle: Please use the reset link from your email.
invalidLink.message: Invalid link. Please use the reset link from your email.

success.title: Password updated
success.message: Your password has been reset successfully.
success.signInLink: Sign in with your new password

expired.title: Link expired
expired.subtitle: Request a fresh reset link when you're ready.
expired.message: This link has expired or was already used. Request a new one.

error.minLength: Password must be at least 12 characters.
error.needsLetter: Password must contain at least one letter.
error.needsDigit: Password must contain at least one digit.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

invalidLink.title: That link didn't work
invalidLink.subtitle: Please use the verification link from your email.
invalidLink.message: Invalid link. Please use the verification link from your email.

loading.title: Verifying your email...
loading.message: This should only take a moment.

error.expiredMessage: This link is invalid or expired.
error.genericSubtitle: Try again or head back to sign in.
error.genericMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.resendDone: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

resendError.needsSignIn: Please sign in and try again from the banner.
resendError.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.title: Email verified!
success.message: Your email is confirmed. You're all set.

pendingConsent.expiredSubtitle: Start again so we can recheck the right account.
pendingConsent.expiredBody: We need your email to recheck your account.
pendingConsent.almostThereSubtitle: We've emailed your grown-up to approve your account.
pendingConsent.body: We've emailed your parent at the address you provided. Once they click the approval link, you'll be able to log in.
pendingConsent.enterPassword: Enter your password to sign in
pendingConsent.stillPending: Not approved yet — please wait until your parent clicks the email link.
pendingConsent.declined: Your parent has declined this account.

verifyEmailBanner.sent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.

invalidLink.title: That link didn't work
invalidLink.subtitle: Please use the approval link from your email.
invalidLink.errorMessage: This link is missing its token.

loading.title: Checking the approval link...
loading.message: This should only take a moment.

linkUnavailable.title: Link unavailable
linkUnavailable.subtitle: This approval link may have already been used.
linkUnavailable.errorExpired: This link is invalid, expired, or already used.
linkUnavailable.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

approved.title: All set — thank you!
approved.message: Your child can now sign in to InvestiKid.

review.title: Approve your child's account
review.subtitle: Review the request before your child signs in.
review.childSuffix: signed up for InvestiKid and listed you as their parent.
review.attestLabel: I confirm I am {{username}}'s parent or legal guardian and am over 18.
